summary: The testbench expects TopModule to have output ports Y2 and Y4, which are missing from the current RTL. This causes elaboration errors and prevents simulation. The patch adds Y2 and Y4 as outputs and implements their logic according to the state machine and one-hot encoding: Y2 is the next-state signal for y[1] (state B), and Y4 is the next-state signal for y[3] (state D). The logic for Y2 and Y4 is derived by inspection of the state diagram and matches the style of the existing Y1 and Y3 assignments.
risks: If the state diagram interpretation is incorrect, the next-state logic for Y2 and Y4 may not match the reference.
If the testbench expects different logic for Y2/Y4, further adjustment may be needed.
next_steps: Re-run simulation to verify that elaboration errors are resolved.
Check functional correctness of Y2 and Y4 outputs against the reference.
If mismatches occur, review the state diagram and next-state assignments for possible corrections.
